displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Sweat odour prevention all day long
• 2-in-1 cleans and softens
• Penetrates deeply into fabric fibres for a thorough clean
• Removes tough stains
• Easy to iron
• Long lasting floral fragrance and stay fresh all day long
• Suitable for overnight and indoor drying

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Top Load:
1. 1/2 cap = 30L (10 pieces - 15 pieces)
2. 1 cap = 50L (16 pieces - 20 pieces)
3. 1 and 1/2 cap = 70L (21 pieces - 25 pieces)
• Front Load:
1/2 cap (16 pieces - 20 pieces)
• Hand Wash:
1/2 cap = 8L (5 pieces - 10 pieces)
• Noodles:
Apply detergent directly on stubborn stains
Suitable for all washable cotton, linens, aritficial skills and synthenic fibres
• Caution:
Do not drink and if swallowed, take plenty of water and consult physician
2. Avoid contact eyes and if into contact, flush with water and consult physician
3. Wear rubber gloves when hand washing
4. If the detergent is spilled on the washing machine, wipe off with damp or wet cloth

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Keep out of reach of children

tags.name: Spring cleaning clean Celebrate with Abundance
Campaign household fair Lanundry care dishwashing cleaning products

product.description:
1. 3D Clean Action
2. Softens - Innovatively formulated with fabric softener to keep your clothes clean, soft and smooth in just 1 step! It also contains fibre smoothing essence which reduces wrinkles on clothes after drying to facilitate easy ironing
3. Remove tough stains - Penetrates deeply into fabric fibres even on areas like collars and cuffs to get rid of stubborn stains
4. Lingering fragrance - Leaves clothes with a refreshing floral fragrance that lasts from wash, dry to wear
5. Advanced anti-bacterial formula that inhibits bacteria growth, preventing odour from wash to wear

metaData.Key Information:
• Removes stubborn stains on areas like collars and cuffs
• Kills germs and softens with just 1 spoonful
• It contains an advanced anti-bacterial formula that removes and inhibits bacteria growth
• Eliminating unpleasant smells like musty or sweat odors from wash to wear
